weekly picks (Jul 3 week 2026)

Posted on July 20, 2026 in 2026jul,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 July 3rd week collection

===Qwen & Hermes’ pick===

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

07/24

  1. science.aed9202 Step geometry–guided growth of rhombohedral graphene (Science)

07/23

  1. s41567-026-03372-7 A magnetic impurity sets off ripples in a kagome superconductor (Nature Physics)

  2. s41567-026-03374-5 From electronic clovers to emergent quantum matter (Nature Physics)

  3. s42005-026-02766-6 Real-Time Modeling of Skyrmion Dynamics in Arbitrary 2D Spatially Dependent Pinning Potential Landscapes (Communications Physics)
